boundary: P9 starts action-level completion for the P8-leading Spin(10) branch.  It supplies generator and interface data, but it does not yet choose a full Higgs potential, mediator spectrum, flavor fit, or numerical proton-bound evaluation.

maps.label: SU4/E_SM leptoquark E_ellr
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: One complex broken SU(4) root; its conjugate is E_color,ell.

maps.label: SU4/E_SM leptoquark E_rell
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: Conjugate complex broken SU(4) root.

maps.label: SU4/E_SM leptoquark E_ellg
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: One complex broken SU(4) root; its conjugate is E_color,ell.

maps.label: SU4/E_SM leptoquark E_gell
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: Conjugate complex broken SU(4) root.

maps.label: SU4/E_SM leptoquark E_ellb
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: One complex broken SU(4) root; its conjugate is E_color,ell.

maps.label: SU4/E_SM leptoquark E_bell
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: Conjugate complex broken SU(4) root.

maps.label: SU2_R T_R^+
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: Raises T3R and carries SM hypercharge +1 after SU(2)_R breaking.

maps.label: SU2_R T_R^-
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: Lowers T3R and carries SM hypercharge -1 after SU(2)_R breaking.

maps.label: (6,2,2) C_[rg],u,minus
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate
maps.note: Antisymmetric SU(4) Clebsch map from (4,2,1) to (bar4,1,2).  The conjugate map gives the reverse chirality-block transition.

maps.label: (6,2,2) C_[rg],u,plus
maps.normalization: sparse Clebsch map; hermitian vector generators are obtained by adding the conjugate map and its i-rotated partner when appropriate

p4_transition_coverage.missing_p4_pair_interpretation: These P4 bookkeeping transitions are not generated by the Spin(10) adjoint gauge-vector maps in the 16.  They remain possible scalar/source/auxiliary completion channels if a later branch activates them, but P9 must not misidentify them as D5 gauge generators.

goldstone_higgs_completion_templates.mass_formula: M_X^2 = g_10^2 <v| T_X T_X |v> after diagonalizing the broken-generator mass matrix

goldstone_higgs_completion_templates.broken_generators: SU(4) leptoquark roots E_{ell a}, E_{a ell}

goldstone_higgs_completion_templates.goldstone_formula: phi_R^+ proportional to T_R^+ v_R and conjugate

mediator_mass_and_coupling_inputs.meaning: Spin(10) unified gauge coupling at matching scale
mass eigenvalues for Spin(10)/Pati-Salam broken vectors
colored Higgs/scalar triplet masses and Yukawa couplings if scalar branches are activated

physical_flavor_rotation_inputs.gauge_to_mass_basis: f_gauge_i = (U_f)_{i a} f_mass_a for f in {Q,L,u^c,d^c,nu^c,e^c}

observable_constraints.CKM: built from the left quark rotations after electroweak breaking
observable_constraints.PMNS: built from charged-lepton and light-neutrino rotations after seesaw/majorana matching

physical_flavor_rotation_inputs.wilson_rotation_template: C_phys[a b c d] = U_f1[i a] U_f2[j b] U_f3[k c] U_f4[l d] C_gauge[i j k l]

required_external_inputs: current experimental lower lifetime limit tau_exp for each proton channel
completed P6 branch and mediator spectrum
physical Wilson basis and chiral contractions
flavor rotations from gauge basis to mass basis
RG evolution factors from matching scale to hadronic scale
proton_bound_inputs.bound_template: Gamma(p -> a)=C_phys^dagger H^(a) C_phys, tau_exp(a) > 1/Gamma(p -> a)
proton_bound_inputs.p9_boundary: P9 supplies the interface and Spin(10) generator data.  It does not insert numerical current experimental limits or compute lifetimes.

p9_status.broken_generator_matrices: sparse transition maps supplied and checked against P4
p9_status.goldstone_higgs_completion: formulae supplied; order parameter branch not chosen
p9_status.mediator_masses_couplings: symbolic inputs listed; no spectrum fixed
p9_status.physical_flavor_rotations: interface supplied; no flavor benchmark inserted
p9_status.proton_bound_inputs: input interface supplied; no numerical lifetime claim

next_stage.required_decision: Choose a concrete Spin(10)-breaking order parameter/source branch, then diagonalize broken-vector masses and replay P6/P7 with explicit masses, couplings, and flavor rotations.
